data.content:
Plan recorded: use a global upgrade-check state file under the Knots app-data directory, add a dedicated startup banner module with 24h throttling and <=2s probe timeout, and extract shared remote-version helpers out of `doctor` so the banner and `kno doctor` reuse the same comparison logic.

Implementation should keep failures best-effort, preserve the existing `KNOTS_SKIP_DOCTOR_UPGRADE` test escape hatch, and add focused unit tests for fresh/stale/failed/newer-version scenarios without relying on live network access. No child knots were created.
